subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down by the Lord of Might unto him who hath turned unto Mine horizon, hearkened unto My call, and set his heart toward the Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الجبروت لمن اقبل الی افقی و سمع ندائی و توجه بقلبه الی مقام
